$comment: GOLDEN PATH — the single canonical Orders example. Source of truth for every surface: the SDK quickstart code, the OpenAPI request/response examples (openapi/orders.yaml), and the developer portal's Orders page all render or match THIS file. A CI drift gate (examples/golden-path/golden.test.mjs) fails if any surface diverges. Money is integer minor units; MMK has 0 decimal places so minor units == kyat. Values are illustrative (Orders is experimental / not yet live).
